title: lantana camara var. mutabilis
intro: Lantana camara var. mutabilis, also known as the 'Shrubby Tangle' or 'Queen of the South', is a variety of the Lantana camara plant, a flowering shrub native to the Americas. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lantana camara var. mutabilis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lantana camara var. mutabilis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
